sections.title: After completing Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Evil Dave

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Welcome to my BASEMENT OF DOOM!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Woah, that's one totally evil cat! It looks way more evil than you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That outfit is TOTALLY EVIL! I'm almost scared of you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That outfit is TOTALLY EVIL! And you've got an evil cat too! To be honest I'm a little bit scared of you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice basement!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Nice?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean, evil!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Yeah! I'm going to use it to summon DEMONS to DO MY BIDDING, or raise an ARMY OF THE UNDEAD! And then I'm going to totally, like, take over the world!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Ah-ha-ha-ha-ha-haa!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So have you had any luck with the demon-summoning?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well, I thought I should start small, so I asked Wizard Grayzag for some help with summoning imps...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And did you manage to summon any?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well, not imps, exactly. It turns out they're not the lowest form of demon after all. I got these hell-rats.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: They're hardly evil at all! They're just like regular rats only they smell vaguely of sulphur!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: If my ARMY OF DARKNESS doesn't get you first!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Soon you will return to bow before my EVIL THRONE!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: If you can find your way out of my BASEMENT OF DOOM!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: And together we will lead Gielinor into a NEW DARK AGE!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Of course you will return! There is no escape from my DARK POWER!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Weren't you going to give up evil?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Yeah, well...

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I did try. I wore this bright red jumper and I got up in the morning and spent the day outside in the sunshine...

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I couldn't keep it up. I just didn't find anything good very interesting, you know?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Sometimes I worry about the consequences of evil. I don't really want anyone to get hurt, not like what happened with Denath.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I can't not be evil! It's just who I am!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Ah-ha-ha-ha-ha-haa!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me try to explain the time travel thing again...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Although you're here, you're also still in the time freeze.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean, the whole room was frozen in time at the moment the culinomancer cast his spell, right?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What? I didn't notice anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course you didn't! You were frozen!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: So how can I be there and also here? Which one is me?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I mean, I feel like I'm me, but what if I'm not me?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That would be terrible!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're both you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: How does that work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From YOUR point of view I've saved you, but from MINE I haven't.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Well that's all right, as long as I'm saved from my point of view!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I have to save you, otherwise you won't be saved!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I'm here so you must already have saved me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's what I meant, from your point of view I've saved you but from mine I haven't!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've to take the food back in time to give it to you.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because otherwise you won't be saved from the culinomancer's spell.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I was saved from the spell! I remember it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exactly! That's why I know I have to go back and save you!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What will happen if you don't?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't not, because I already have!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The fact that you're here means I already did save you, which means that you have to tell me the correct recipe. It's logically impossible for you not to!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I don't understand this at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There will be a temporal paradox and the universe will implode!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Oh no! That would be bad, and not even in an evil way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exactly! So you've got to tell me the recipe!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: But I still don't understand why you need the recipe when you've already saved me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That's not very helpful. I don't even understand why you need the recipe anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've got to tell me because the magic requires it!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That's what you said before! Honestly, why make it more complicated than it needs to be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, never mind.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: That is not the evil answer I requested!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Evil Dave
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
